species: The collection and use of clinical materials were approved by the Medical Research Ethics Committee of The First Affiliated Hospital of the University of Science and Technology of China.
cell_type: GSCs were isolated from primary GBMs or xenografts...
sample_source: De-identified GBM surgical specimens were collected...
age: GBM tissues were obtained from patients aged 43–66 years.
cell_line: T387, T4121, H2S and T3832 GSCs were kind gifts from Dr. Jeremy Rich...
sex: The GBM tissues 4404, 1205 and 5425 were from female patients.
